title: 6" Outdoor Tactical Neck Chain Knife Survival Paracord Wrapped Handle
description:
Be prepared for any situation with these Survival Paracord Wrapped Neck Chain Knives! Measuring in at only 6" long, these neck chain knives make for a perfect protection blade. They each feature a stainless steel fixed blade as well as a razor sharp edge. In addition, each of these knives comes wrapped with highly durable survival 550 paracord, which can be unraveled from the handle at any time in order to assist in an emergency situation. These blades also come with an impact resistant sheath that allows for quick release, so you'll have easy access to your blade at all times. Each sheath comes attached to a sturdy black neck chain to hang conveniently around your neck or out of your pocket
